languages.text: {n}Батошски хищно ухмыляется.{/n} "Это тут, в Клети, и полуроты не наберется. Хотя не всех вы видели, кто-то осадой Погонщицы отрезан, а кого-то я припрятал на всякий случай. А вот по миру у нас раскидано немало поселений поменьше, перевалочных пунктов для охотничьих отделений да всяких прочих укреплений. Так что даже если мы все тут подохнем, по воле Бога-Императора, остальной полк будет жить".

{n}Batoshski gives a vicious grin.{/n} "Here in the Cage, we don't even have half a company, it's true, though you haven't seen the whole lot: some have been cut off by the Drover's siege, and others I've stashed away just in case. Still, we have plenty of smaller outposts scattered across the world, transit points for hunting units and all kinds of other strongholds. So even if we all die here by the God-Emperor's will, the rest of the regiment will live."
languages.original_text: {n}Батошски хищно ухмыляется.{/n} "Это тут, в Клети, и полуроты не наберется. Хотя не всех вы видели, кто-то осадой Погонщицы отрезан, а кого-то я припрятал на всякий случай. А вот по миру у нас раскидано немало поселений поменьше, перевалочных пунктов для охотничьих отделений да всяких прочих укреплений. Так что даже если мы все тут подохнем, по воле Бога-Императора, остальной полк будет жить".

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski gives a predatory grin.{/n} "Here in the Cage, we don't even have half a company. Thought you haven't seen the whole lot. Some are trapped by the Drover's siege, and others I've stashed away just in case. Still, we have plenty of smaller outposts scattered across the world, transit points for hunting units and all kinds of other strongholds. So even if we all die here by the God-Emperor's will, the rest of the regiment will live."

{n}Batoshski gives a predatory grin.{/n} "I thought you hadn't seen the whole lot. Here in the Cage, we don't even have half a company. {n}Batoshski grins with good humour, taking no offence at your comment.{/n} "A valid point. We don't even have half a company here in Tsar-Cage. Well, not if you adhere to guidelines. But we have numerous smaller settlements scattered around the planet, staging areas for hunting parties. Plus, since the Drover's siege began, some people have managed to break out of the encirclement. So even if we all die here by the God-Emperor's will, the rest of the regiment will live."

languages.text: {n}バトシュスキーはあなたの言葉に気を悪くすることもなく、上機嫌にニヤリと笑った。{/n}「もっともだ。ツァー・ケージにいるのは中隊の半分にも満たない。編制に厳密に従うなら、の話だがな。だが、この惑星には狩猟隊の集結地になっている小さな入植地が点々とある。加えて、ドローヴァーの包囲が始まってからは、包囲を破って抜け出せた者もいる。だから、たとえここで我々が神皇帝の御心のままに全滅しようとも、連隊の残りは生き延びるさ」
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski grins with good humour, taking no offence at your comment.{/n} "A valid point. We don't even have half a company here in Tsar-Cage. Well, not if you adhere to guidelines. But we have numerous smaller settlements scattered around the planet, staging areas for hunting parties. Plus, since the Drover's siege began, some people have managed to break out of the encirclement. So even if we all die here by the God-Emperor's will, the rest of the regiment will live."

traits.locale_text: {n}バトシュスキーはあなたの言葉に気を悪くすることもなく、上機嫌にニヤリと笑った。{/n}「もっともだ。ツァー・ケージにいるのは中隊の半分にも満たない。編制に厳密に従うなら、の話だがな。だが、この惑星には狩猟隊の集結地になっている小さな入植地が点々とある。加えて、ドローヴァーの包囲が始まってからは、包囲を破って抜け出せた者もいる。だから、たとえここで我々が神皇帝の御心のままに全滅しようとも、連隊の残りは生き延びるさ。」

languages.text: {n}Batoshski vous adresse un rictus cynique.{/n} « Ici, dans la Cage, nous n'avons même pas la moitié d'une compagnie, mais vous n'avez pas encore vu tous nos soldats. Certains sont encerclés par le Chasseur, et j'en ai placé d'autres en réserve au cas où. Sans compter que nous avons de nombreuses bases plus petites disséminées aux quatre coins de la planète, des relais pour les unités de chasse et toutes sortes de places fortes. Alors, même si nous devons tous mourir ici par la volonté de l'Empereur-Dieu, le reste du régiment survivra. »
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski gives a vicious grin.{/n} "Here in the Cage, we don't even have half a company, it's true, though you haven't seen the whole lot: some have been cut off by the Drover's siege, and others I've stashed away just in case. Still, we have plenty of smaller outposts scattered across the world, transit points for hunting units and all kinds of other strongholds. So even if we all die here by the God-Emperor's will, the rest of the regiment will live."

languages.text: {n}Batoshski vahşice sırıtıyor.{/n} "Kafes'te yarım bir bölüğümüz bile olmadığı doğru. Gerçi hepimizi görmediniz. Bazıları Çoban'ın kuşatmasında ayrı düştü, diğerlerini de ne olur ne olmaz diye sakladım. Yine de dünya geneline dağılmış çok sayıda küçük karakolumuz, av birimleri için geçiş noktalarımız ve her türlü başka kalelerimiz var. Yani Tanrı İmparator'un iradesiyle hepimiz burada ölsek bile alayın kalanı yaşayacak."
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski gives a vicious grin.{/n} "Here in the Cage, we don't even have half a company, it's true, though you haven't seen the whole lot: some have been cut off by the Drover's siege, and others I've stashed away just in case. Still, we have plenty of smaller outposts scattered across the world, transit points for hunting units and all kinds of other strongholds. So even if we all die here by the God-Emperor's will, the rest of the regiment will live."

languages.text: {n}Batoshski esboza una sonrisa salvaje.{/n} «Aquí en la Jaula ni siquiera tenemos media compañía, es cierto, pero aún no los ha visto a todos: algunos siguen cercados por el Pastor, y a otros los guardo a buen recaudo por si acaso. Pero hay puestos avanzados más pequeños esparcidos por todo el planeta, zonas de preparación para las partidas de caza y toda clase de baluartes similares. Aunque el Dios Emperador quisiera que todos muriéramos aquí, el resto del regimiento sobreviviría».
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski gives a vicious grin.{/n} "Here in the Cage, we don't even have half a company, it's true, though you haven't seen the whole lot: some have been cut off by the Drover's siege, and others I've stashed away just in case. Still, we have plenty of smaller outposts scattered across the world, transit points for hunting units and all kinds of other strongholds. So even if we all die here by the God-Emperor's will, the rest of the regiment will live."

languages.text: {n}巴托什斯基露出凶狠的笑容。{/n}“牢笼这边的确连半个连的编制都达不到，不过您还没见到我们的全部兵力。有的被拒生花困住了，还有的被我藏起来当后手。不过，我们在这个世界还有很多分散的小前哨站、狩猎队的转运点，还有各种其他据点。所以就算神皇的意志要我们全死在这里，这个军团也还能存活下去。”
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski gives a vicious grin.{/n} "Here in the Cage, we don't even have half a company, it's true, though you haven't seen the whole lot: some have been cut off by the Drover's siege, and others I've stashed away just in case. Still, we have plenty of smaller outposts scattered across the world, transit points for hunting units and all kinds of other strongholds. So even if we all die here by the God-Emperor's will, the rest of the regiment will live."

languages.text: {n}Batoshski grinst dich boshaft an.{/n} "Wir haben hier im Käfig keine Lust auf Gesellschaft, das stimmt, aber Ihr habt noch nicht die ganze Bande gesehen: Einige sind der Belagerung des Treibers zum Opfer gefallen, andere habe ich zur Sicherheit versteckt. Wir unterhalten aber in der gesamten Welt einige kleinere Außenposten als Transitpunkte für Jagdeinheiten und verschiedene andere Festungen. Das heißt, selbst wenn wir hier alle sterben, wird der Rest des Regiments leben, so es der Gottimperator will."
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski gives a vicious grin.{/n} "Here in the Cage, we don't even have half a company, it's true, though you haven't seen the whole lot: some have been cut off by the Drover's siege, and others I've stashed away just in case. Still, we have plenty of smaller outposts scattered across the world, transit points for hunting units and all kinds of other strongholds. So even if we all die here by the God-Emperor's will, the rest of the regiment will live."
